title: The Geometry of Meaning (Latent Space Explained)
description:
How do AI models like the one you chat with understand words? They don't. They understand numbers. We explore 'Latent Space', mapping concepts from simple 2D charts to the massive hyperdimensional coordinates that power modern AI.

0:00 The Illusion of Words
0:10 The 2D Map
0:22 The 3D Jump
0:27 Hyperdimensional Reality
0:48 Vector Math (King - Man + Woman = Queen)
1:03 Conclusion
